intent: Review Initiative 132 dependency and lineage context using a bounded read-only ContributionGraph excerpt.
desiredOutcome: A recommendation-only Hermes132 synthesis that cites graph context without mutating graph storage or promoting evidence.

requiredCapabilities.selectionRationale: Hermes132 may synthesize bounded graph context but cannot execute or mutate.
The task needs read-only lineage and dependency context from ContributionGraph.

uncertainties.summary: Any graph-derived recommendation may affect initiative sequencing if promoted.
uncertainties.recommendedAction: Keep Hermes output recommendation-only and require steward review before durable promotion.

evaluationRequirements.notes: Source manifest must identify the exact graph artifact or graph excerpt.
Audit unit must bound the graph question and prohibit mutation.
Hermes132 must emit one session record and one synthesis artifact.
Any graph-derived promotion requires steward review.

shortTerm.notes: Read-only graph excerpt for bounded advisory synthesis.

working.notes: Project reviewed synthesis to heap only after operator review.

execution.notes: No runtime execution occurs in this route.

promotionPath.notes: Graph context informs advisory synthesis only; it does not create graph authority.
